name: Security Check on Write
description: Verify no secrets or security issues are introduced when writing files

then.prompt: Before writing this file, verify: 1) No hardcoded secrets, tokens, or passwords are present. 2) No SQL injection patterns (string concatenation in queries). 3) No disabled SSL/TLS verification. 4) No sensitive data that would be logged. If any security issue is found, DENY the write and explain the issue.
